content.question: How do families with children in depopulating villages actually respond (migration, school choice, commuting patterns) to school closure versus retention, and do responses differ systematically by socioeconomic status, ethnicity, or commuting feasibility?
content.reduction_path: Design a panel household survey in matched pairs of villages (one with recent closure, one retaining school) tracking 3-5 years of family residential and schooling choices, with detailed income/ethnicity/job location data to identify differential response patterns.
